description:
**Source:** CLO/CTO report P0-001 (P0 — BLOCKING)
**Assigned to Jake for review before agent pickup.**

**Problem:** LICENSE file currently reads "Copyright 2025 Jake Strawn" — a personal name on a business asset creates ownership ambiguity and weakens IP claims.

**Action:** Update the LICENSE file copyright line to:
```
Copyright 2025-2026 Clarity House LLC d/b/a Booked Solid Technology
```

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] LICENSE copyright holder reads "Clarity House LLC d/b/a Booked Solid Technology"
- [ ] Year range is "2025-2026"
- [ ] No other references to personal name as copyright holder exist in the repo
title: P0-001: Fix HELiXiR LICENSE copyright holder
